info.title: PayCan Admin API Documentation
info.description: Admin API for PayCan payment processing platform. Manage products, orders, subscriptions, and system configuration. Requires API Key authentication.

get.description: Retrieve paginated and filterable list of all orders in the system (admin only)
Retrieve a specific order by ID with all details (admin only)
Retrieve paginated and filterable list of all products (admin only)
Retrieve a specific product by ID (admin only)
Get all prices for a specific product

post.description: Create a new price for a product

get.description: Retrieve paginated and filterable list of all transactions (admin only)
Retrieve a specific transaction by ID (admin only)
Retrieve paginated and filterable list of all users (admin only)
Retrieve a specific user by ID (admin only)

post.summary: Sync user and generate JWT token
post.description: Creates or updates a user and returns a JWT token. Requires API key authentication via X-API-Key header. Uses user_id as the unique identifier. For NEW users: name and email are required. For EXISTING users: updates are optional.

user_id.description: User ID - will be used as the user's primary key

user.description: User data - REQUIRED for new users (must include name and email), OPTIONAL for existing users (updates provided fields)

name.description: User's name (required for new users, optional for updates)

email.description: User's email (required for new users, optional for updates)

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

post.description: Handles webhook events from Stripe payment gateway. This endpoint verifies the webhook signature and processes events like successful payments, subscription updates, and cancellations. No authentication required - signature validation is performed automatically.

object.description: The actual Stripe object (payment intent, subscription, etc.)

post.description: Handles webhook events from PayPal payment gateway. This endpoint verifies the webhook signature and processes events like successful payments, subscription updates, and cancellations. No authentication required - signature validation is performed automatically.

current_period_end.description: Current billing period end (alias, unified display)

can_resume.description: Whether the subscription can be resumed

ValidationErrorResponse.title: Validation Error Response
ValidationErrorResponse.description: Validation error response with field-specific errors

apiKeyHeader.description: API Secret Key in X-API-Key header. Get from Admin Panel > Settings > API Secret Key. Format: X-API-Key: pk_xxxxx
apiKeyHeader.name: X-API-Key

apiKeyQuery.description: API Secret Key in query parameter. Only works in local development (APP_ENV=local) for debugging. Format: ?api_key=pk_xxxxx (NOT available in production)
apiKeyQuery.name: api_key

tags.name: Admin Orders
tags.description: Admin order management endpoints - view all orders system-wide

tags.name: Admin Products
tags.description: Admin product and price management endpoints

tags.name: Admin User Tokens
tags.description: Admin endpoints for user synchronization and token generation
